item.name: Search Patent Applications by Query Parameters

request.name: Search Patent Applications by Query Parameters

description.content: Search patent applications using query parameters. When no parameters are supplied, the top 25 applications are returned.

query.description: Search query string supporting boolean operators (AND, OR, NOT), wildcards (*), and exact phrases ("").
Start date for date range filter (YYYY-MM-DD)
End date for date range filter (YYYY-MM-DD)

The USPTO Open Data Portal (ODP) API allows public users to discover, search, and extract USPTO patent, trademark, PTAB trial, petition decision, and bulk dataset data at no cost. An ODP API key is required, passed via the X-API-KEY request header.

Contact Support:
 Name: USPTO
 Email: data@uspto.gov
